items.title: Actuarial Intern
items.description: Rotated across four divisions: CIR, FSA, GCRM, and Risk Management. Contributed to the development of actuarial models and risk assessment tools.
achievements: Assisted in reviewing insurance documents, quotations, and policy-related information.
Supported claims administration and claim monitoring activities.
Conducted a case study by applying statistical and machine learning methods to support risk assessment and decision-making.

items.title: Practicum Assistant of Statistical Data Analysis
items.description: Assisted lecturers in facilitating practical sessions on statistical data analysis
achievements: Guided students in using Microsoft Excel and R for data processing, analysis, and interpretation.
Supported the review of assignments and practical work, ensuring accuracy and attention to detail.
Developed analytical, communication, and problem-solving skills through student mentoring and academic assistance.
